name: balance_attestation_verifier
description: LEZ on-chain gate that admits a presenter once per (gate, nullifier) after recursively verifying a balance-attestation receipt. Implements the Spike-0C / Logos-native private execution path described in docs/ONCHAIN_PATH_DECISION.md.

instructions.name: init_gate
instructions.description: Initialize a fresh gate state account pinned to a (chain_id, verifier_id, gate_id, threshold) tuple. The expected_inner_image_id is also recorded so future admit calls can reject outer receipts with a different inner circuit.

instructions.name: admit
instructions.description: Validate an outer LEZ-gate receipt and admit the presenter. Steps mirror lez_verifier::LezGateProgram::admit: (1) outer receipt verifies against the pinned LEZ_BALANCE_GATE_ID, (2) outer journal version + inner_image_id match the gate state, (3) gate_context_id matches the gate, (4) accepted_threshold >= gate.threshold, (5) accepted_context_nullifier is not already in admitted_nullifiers, (6) presenter LEZ tx-signing account hashes to accepted_presenter_id.

accounts.name: presenter
accounts.notes: LEZ account whose hash must equal outer_journal.accepted_presenter_id.

instructions.name: read_gate
instructions.description: Read-only helper used by CLI / Basecamp runners. Returns the gate state's pinned (chain_id, verifier_id, gate_id, threshold, expected_inner_image_id) and the list of admitted nullifiers. Does not mutate state.

types.name: BalanceAttestationJournal
types.description: Inner journal committed by the balance-attestation circuit. Mirrors attestation_core::BalanceAttestationJournal byte-for-byte.

types.name: BalanceAttestationEnvelope
types.description: Off-chain transport envelope. The on-chain admit() does NOT consume this directly — it consumes the outer LEZ-gate receipt produced by lez_verifier::prove_lez_gate(envelope).

fields.name: presenter_pubkey
fields.notes: BIP-340 x-only Schnorr pubkey. Off-chain only.

fields.name: presenter_signature
fields.notes: BIP-340 Schnorr sig over journal.digest(). Off-chain only.

types.name: LezGateJournal
types.description: Journal committed by the outer lez_balance_gate guest. Decoded by admit() and compared against gate state.

encoding.notes: CLI tooling reads/writes JSON; the LEZ runtime serializes program account data as Borsh V1. Receipt bytes inside the envelope are serde_json-encoded risc0_zkvm::Receipt for transport (verifiers deserialize and call .verify()).
